name: Rice with Kimchee (Kimchee Bap)
recipeIngredient: 7 oz. or 200 g Rib eye, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the Kimchee without rinsing.
2. Marinate the Rib eye in the Seasoning Mixture.
3. Saute rice in sesame oil until translucent.
4. In a deep pan or rice cooker, place 1/3 of the Kimchee, repeat the process two more times, and add 3 1/3 cups water. Cook as for rice.
5. While cooking rice, make Egg Decorations by scrambling eggs. Shred the cooked egg.
6. Serve rice with shredded Egg Decoration on top.
NOTE: The flavor of this dish depends on the flavor of the Kimchee.
